name: D1 Ch8 — Grand Cavern Wandering Monsters, Western Half (1-in-12)
description: Wandering monster table for the Western Half of the Grand Cavern (encounter area Q-18/19), Chapter 8 of D1-2. Encounter frequency: 1 in 12 per turn. Roll 1d12; on a 1, roll 1d4 on this table. Standard stats: Bugbear AC 3, hp 14, Dmg 4-10/2-8, XPV 191; Gargoyle hp 22, XPV 275; Troll hp 28, XPV 749.

results.text: Drow patrol, mixed (2 male fighters, 1 male patrol leader + non-drow troops)
Drow merchants — roll 1d3: 1=small train, 2=medium train, 3=large train
